strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience with demonstrated expertise in high-scale, low-latency distributed systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to work across full technology stack and learn new domains rapidly with strong backend and systems engineering fundamentals
Track record of mentorship, knowledge sharing through workshops, open-source contributions, and public speaking engagement
concerns: No demonstrated executive-level team leadership; resume shows individual and staff-level contributions but no evidence of scaling engineering organizations to 10-30+ people or building technical leadership layers
Agentic AI production experience appears limited to recent role (started April 2025); role requires demonstrated production track record of multi-agent systems in commercial contexts
Complete absence of fintech infrastructure experience and no track record operating systems in regulated, high-stakes financial environments

key_factors.factor: Absence of executive team leadership experience
Insufficient production multi-agent AI system experience
Strong distributed systems and real-time infrastructure foundation

response.justification: Szabo brings strong systems engineering fundamentals and technical breadth, particularly in high-scale infrastructure. However, the resume presents significant gaps against core CTO requirements: no demonstrated executive leadership scaling teams, recent and unproven agentic AI experience, and complete absence of fintech infrastructure and regulated-environment expertise. While the systems engineering background provides a foundation for backend aspects, the role demands immediate operational capability in executive leadership, production agentic AI orchestration, and fintech compliance—areas where the resume shows insufficient depth.
